title: AnhyFamily
description: Marriage, adoption, family home, family chest, family chat, hugs
body:
**AnhyFamily** is a powerful plugin for Minecraft servers that significantly enhances social interactions among players. It offers a wide range of features for creating and managing families, including marriage, adoption, and flexible customization of names, genders, and prefixes.

**Key Features:**

- **Family Interactions**: Create families, get married, adopt, and sever relationships.
- **Customization**: Set names, surnames, gender options, and family prefixes.
- **Interactive Commands**: Family chat, home, chest, and hugs.
- **Payment Options**: Support for payments in virtual currency, items, and cryptocurrency (in development).
- **Information**: View profiles, family trees, and use placeholders.
- **Administrative Control**: Flexible permissions and configuration system.

**AnhyFamily** adds depth and realism to the social aspects of the game, making it an essential addition to any Minecraft server.

For detailed documentation, visit [AnhyFamily Documentation](https://dev.anh.ink/anhyfamily/).

To report bugs, join our [Bug Report Discord](https://discord.gg/8FGcTnN5g4).

For suggestions and feedback, visit our [Suggestions Discord](https://discord.gg/bUKP48x6zs).
